product_overview: GaziOnline is a Bengali-language front-end platform that lets citizens apply for PAN cards, verify Aadhaar, and track application status, plus a UI-only admin dashboard (Nexus Command) for managing services and operational modules.
core_goals: Provide a simple, Bengali-first PAN card application flow accessible from the homepage
Allow citizens to verify Aadhaar and track the status of submitted applications
Expose an admin dashboard (Nexus Command) with modules for Services, Citizens, Finances, Fleet, Logistics, Marketplace, AI, Risk, and Workforce (UI-only)
Maintain responsive, animated, and accessible UI with Next.js, React, and Tailwind

features.name: Homepage Hero
features.description: Primary landing section with Bengali heading, animated stats panel, and CTAs that open the PAN application modal.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View hero heading and description -> View quick stats panel with live badge -> Click "প্যান কার্ড আবেদন করুন" button -> PAN application modal opens -> Fill PAN application fields -> Click Submit button -> See application submission confirmation
Navigate to / -> View hero heading and description -> Click "অ্যাপয়েন্টমেন্ট বুক করুন" button -> PAN application modal opens -> Close modal via close button -> See modal closed

features.name: Service Bento Grid
features.description: Grid display of available services where users can browse service cards and start an application via the Apply button.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to service bento grid -> View service cards in bento grid layout -> Hover over a service card -> See hover effects -> Click apply button on a service card -> PAN application modal opens -> Fill form fields -> Click Submit button -> See application submission confirmation

Navigate to / -> Scroll to service bento grid -> Click apply button on a service card -> PAN application modal opens -> Fill form with invalid data -> Click Submit button -> See validation errors on invalid fields

features.name: PAN Application Modal
features.description: Modal form for submitting PAN card applications with validation and standard open/close behaviors.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click "প্যান কার্ড আবেদন করুন" button -> PAN application modal opens -> Fill name field -> Fill Aadhaar number field -> Fill contact fields -> Click Submit button -> See success confirmation message in modal -> Close modal via close button

Navigate to / -> Click apply button on a service card -> PAN application modal opens -> Leave required fields empty -> Click Submit button -> See field-level validation errors via Zod/React Hook Form -> Correct invalid fields -> Click Submit button -> See success confirmation

features.name: Aadhaar Verification
features.description: A component to verify Aadhaar numbers as part of the PAN application flow.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open PAN application modal -> Enter Aadhaar number -> Click submit/verify for Aadhaar -> See Aadhaar verification success indication
Navigate to / -> Open PAN application modal -> Enter invalid Aadhaar number (wrong length/format) -> Click submit/verify for Aadhaar -> See Aadhaar validation error message

features.name: Application Status Tracking
features.description: A tracking page where users enter an application or tracking ID to view application status.
user_flows: Navigate to /track -> Fill tracking ID field with a valid ID -> Click track button -> See application status result
Navigate to /track -> Fill tracking ID field with an invalid or non-existent ID -> Click track button -> See no-results or error message indicating tracking ID not found

features.name: Admin Dashboard (Nexus Command)
features.description: Admin panel that exposes multiple management modules (UI-only) for operations and oversight.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> View sidebar navigation with modules -> Click Services in sidebar -> See services list and stats table -> Click Citizens in sidebar -> See citizens list and data table

Navigate to /admin -> Click Services in sidebar -> Click Create or Edit on a service -> Modify fields and click Save -> See updated data in the UI -> Refresh page or navigate away and back -> See that changes are not persisted (UI-only) and display a non-persistence warning

features.name: Navigation Header
features.description: Fixed top header with brand, section links, and a Nexus Command admin access button.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click "পরিষেবাসমূহ" in header -> Page scrolls to services section on the homepage -> See services bento grid
Navigate to / -> Click "আবেদনের স্থিতি (Track Status)" in header -> Navigate to /track -> See application tracking input
Navigate to / -> Click "Nexus Command" in header -> Navigate to /admin -> See admin dashboard

features.name: Footer
features.description: Footer with site links and legal pages.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to footer -> View footer sections and links -> Click Privacy link -> Navigate to /privacy -> See privacy policy content
Navigate to / -> Scroll to footer -> Click Terms link -> Navigate to /terms -> See terms of service content

routes.description: Homepage with hero section, service bento grid, PAN workflow, trust indicators, and footer
Nexus Command admin dashboard with service catalog, citizens, finances, fleet, logistics, AI, risk, workforce, marketplace sections

features.name: Homepage Hero
features.description: Main landing section with Bengali text, animated stats panel, and CTAs
user_interactions: View hero heading and description
Click "প্যান কার্ড আবেদন করুন" button to open PAN application modal
Click "অ্যাপয়েন্টমেন্ট বুক করুন" button to open PAN application modal
View quick stats panel with live badge

features.name: Service Bento Grid
features.description: Grid display of available services with apply button
user_interactions: View service cards in bento grid layout
Hover over service cards to see hover effects
Click apply button on a service card

features.name: PAN Application Modal
features.description: Modal form for submitting a PAN card application
user_interactions: Open modal via hero CTA or service card apply button
Fill in application form fields
Submit the form
Close modal via close button or backdrop click

features.name: Aadhaar Verification
user_interactions: Enter Aadhaar number
Submit for verification

features.name: Application Status Tracking
user_interactions: Enter application/tracking ID
Click track button
View application status result

features.name: Admin Dashboard (Nexus Command)
features.description: Admin panel with multiple management modules
user_interactions: Navigate to admin dashboard via header link
View sidebar navigation with modules
Click on different admin sections (Services, Citizens, Finances, Fleet, Logistics, Marketplace, AI, Risk, Workforce)
View stats and data tables in each section

features.name: Navigation Header
features.description: Fixed top navigation header with links and admin access
user_interactions: Click "পরিষেবাসমূহ" to scroll to services section
Click "আবেদনের স্থিতি (Track Status)" to navigate to /track
Click "Nexus Command" to navigate to /admin

features.name: Footer
features.description: Site footer with links and information
user_interactions: View footer sections
Click footer links (Privacy, Terms)

known_limitations.issue: Admin CRUD is UI-only, not connected to backend API
known_limitations.impact: Create/update/delete only modify local state, not persisted

known_limitations.issue: Application tracking is likely UI-only with mock data
known_limitations.impact: Tracking results may not reflect real application status
